details.test: Task 1: Save three Grade 6 area & perimeter worksheets to Reading List

Task 3: Create 5-day study plan with two high-rated resources per day
Task 4: Add shortest Grade 10 quadratic-equations video <15min to Watch Later

Task 6: Add four worksheets (self-paced/untimed) to Print Later list

Task 9: Comment on latest math anxiety blog post with on-site reply notifications
